creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
(In reply to comment #7)
The WITH_SDL condition was proposed in bug 98598:
https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/a75af1f5554c5d61fe38e9e5b94d753bcf91ce0d
The SDL, GL, MYSQL, PGSQL options were proposed in bug 126226:
https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/7bd0bfe35d793b8d9e92779729047500fa50f7f4
The GL was renamed to OPENGL option in bug 173199:
https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/97481b1f7f2f91a9ccabe3b221ae07895c1e3fc4
